creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
games/crafty-tablebase-pawn is improperly flagged as unfetchable
	and is due to expire 2011-09-01.  The distfiles are, in fact,
	fetchable.  Yes, they're large, and yes, there are quite a few
	of them, but they are indeed quite fetchable.  No idea how they
	came to be marked as unfetchable.

	This port, as well as the other games/crafty* ports, may very well
	be of interest to serious computer chess enthusiasts, and should be
	retained.

	I am willing to assume maintainership of this port, as well as the
	other unmaintained games/crafty-tablepase-nopawn port, if desired.
	If the current maintainer (flo@FreeBSD.org) of the other crafty* ports
	is no longer interested, I'll take over all of them.

	Thank you!

Fix: Simple patch below.
How-To-Repeat: 	Just be patient while the files are being fetched.   There's a
	lot of data to retrieve, and the server *can* be a tad sluggish
	at times.
